I did some research and came across the Heath Law Firm website.  After reading the information there, I decided to contact them and see what the chances were that I might get the orders granted.  Mark and Paula were more helpful and compassionate than I ever thought possible.  They helped to alleviate my anxiety about the process and addressed my concerns thoroughly.  Covid 19 did slow the process a bit because of the restrictions of the courts and the backlog of cases... But all 4 of my motions were granted without issue.  Paula helped me in making sure that DPS correctly updated my record to show the new dispositions and this chapter is now finally behind me.  I couldn't be more grateful for Mark and Paula and all the assistance they provided.   I highly recommend the Heath Law Firm to anyone who needs legal representation.
